name: Phyllis Diller's Lemon Refrigerator Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Light brown sugar; firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and shortening until fluffy.
2. Add sugar, egg, lemon juice, and lemon peel to the butter mixture. Beat well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, salt, baking soda, nuts, and lemon peel.
4. Mix in the creamed ingredients slowly.
5. Cover the dough and refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. Remove from the refrigerator and form into two 10-inch rolls on waxed paper.
7. Wrap tightly and refrigerate overnight.
8. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Slice the rolls into 1/4-inch slices.
10. Bake on ungreased cookie sheets for 8 to 10 minutes.
Makes about 80 cookies.
